ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If enabled, Dataview will automatically append tasks with their completion date when they are checked in Dataview views.
ast.target: If enabled, Dataview will automatically append tasks with their completion date when they are checked in Dataview views.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Example with default field name and date format: - [x] my task [completion:: 2022-01-01]
ast.target: Example with default field name and date format: - [x] my task [completion:: 2022-01-01]

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If enabled, will use emoji shorthand instead of inline field formatting to fill out implicit task field "completion".
ast.target: If enabled, will use emoji shorthand instead of inline field formatting to fill out implicit task field "completion".

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Disable this to customize the completion date format or field name, or to use Dataview inline field formatting.
ast.target: Disable this to customize the completion date format or field name, or to use Dataview inline field formatting.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled.
ast.target: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Text used as inline field key for task completion date when toggling a task's checkbox in a Dataview view.
ast.target: Text used as inline field key for task completion date when toggling a task's checkbox in a Dataview view.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled and "use emoji shorthand for completion" is disabled.
ast.target: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled and "use emoji shorthand for completion" is disabled.

ast.name: error
ast.source: Couldn't convert value into a JSON string:
ast.target: Couldn't convert value into a JSON string:

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable executing regular inline Dataview queries.
ast.target: Enable or disable executing regular inline Dataview queries.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable executing DataviewJS queries.
ast.target: Enable or disable executing DataviewJS queries.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable or disable executing inline DataviewJS queries. Requires that DataviewJS queries are enabled.
ast.target: Enable or disable executing inline DataviewJS queries. Requires that DataviewJS queries are enabled.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables or disables visual highlighting / pretty rendering for inline fields in reading view.
ast.target: Enables or disables visual highlighting / pretty rendering for inline fields in reading view.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables or disables visual highlighting / pretty rendering for inline fields in Live Preview.
ast.target: Enables or disables visual highlighting / pretty rendering for inline fields in Live Preview.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Keyword for DataviewJS blocks. Defaults to 'dataviewjs'. Reload required for changes to take effect.
ast.target: Keyword for DataviewJS blocks. Defaults to 'dataviewjs'. Reload required for changes to take effect.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prefix to inline queries (to mark them as Dataview queries). Defaults to '='.
ast.target: The prefix to inline queries (to mark them as Dataview queries). Defaults to '='.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The prefix to JavaScript inline queries (to mark them as DataviewJS queries). Defaults to '$='.
ast.target: The prefix to JavaScript inline queries (to mark them as DataviewJS queries). Defaults to '$='.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, inline queries will also be evaluated inside full code blocks.
ast.target: If enabled, inline queries will also be evaluated inside full code blocks.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If toggled off, the small number in the result header of TASK and TABLE queries will be hidden.
ast.target: If toggled off, the small number in the result header of TASK and TABLE queries will be hidden.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, queries which return 0 results will render a warning message.
ast.target: If set, queries which return 0 results will render a warning message.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: What null/non-existent should show up as in tables, by default. This supports Markdown notation.
ast.target: What null/non-existent should show up as in tables, by default. This supports Markdown notation.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How long to wait (in milliseconds) for files to stop changing before updating views.
ast.target: How long to wait (in milliseconds) for files to stop changing before updating views.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the default ID column in tables; this is the auto-generated first column that links to the source file.
ast.target: The name of the default ID column in tables; this is the auto-generated first column that links to the source file.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled.
ast.target: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled and "use emoji shorthand for completion" is disabled.
ast.target: Only available when "automatic task completion tracking" is enabled and "use emoji shorthand for completion" is disabled.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, completing a task in a Dataview will automatically complete its subtasks too.
ast.target: If enabled, completing a task in a Dataview will automatically complete its subtasks too.

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable inline field highlighting in reading view
ast.target: Enable inline field highlighting in reading view

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable inline field highlighting in Live Preview
ast.target: Enable inline field highlighting in Live Preview

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cache metadata about files and sections in the dataview index.
ast.target: Cache metadata about files and sections in the dataview index.

ast.name: message
ast.source: Trailing quote on quoted field is malformed
ast.target: Trailing quote on quoted field is malformed

ast.name: message
ast.source: Dataview: No results to show for task query.
ast.target: Dataview: No results to show for task query.

ast.name: message
ast.source: Dataview: No results to show for list query.
ast.target: Dataview: No results to show for list query.

ast.name: message
ast.source: Dataview: No results to show for table query.
ast.target: Dataview: No results to show for table query.

ast.name: name
ast.source: Force refresh all views and blocks
ast.target: Force refresh all views and blocks

regex.source: log(`Dataview: Encountered a circular list (line number ${lineno}; children ${this.listItems[lineno].children.join(", ")})`)
regex.target: log(`Dataview: Encountered a circular list (line number ${lineno}; children ${this.listItems[lineno].children.join(", ")})`)

regex.source: log(`Dataview: re-initialized index with ${files.length} files (${(Date.now() - start) / 1000.0}s)`)
regex.target: log(`Dataview: re-initialized index with ${files.length} files (${(Date.now() - start) / 1000.0}s)`)

regex.source: log(`Dataview: all ${files.length} files have been indexed in ${(Date.now() - reloadStart) / 1000.0}s (${cached} cached, ${skipped} skipped).`)
regex.target: log(`Dataview: all ${files.length} files have been indexed in ${(Date.now() - reloadStart) / 1000.0}s (${cached} cached, ${skipped} skipped).`)

regex.source: log(`Dataview: Dropped cache entries for ${remaining.size} deleted files.`)
regex.target: log(`Dataview: Dropped cache entries for ${remaining.size} deleted files.`)
